name: jiomart-grocery-products-scraper
title: JioMart Grocery Scraper - Products & Prices
description: Collect public JioMart grocery and product catalog data, including names, brands, pack sizes, prices, MRP, discounts, categories, stock status, images, and URLs.

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the run starts to cover browser startup and the residential proxy session. Number of events depends on memory (one per GB, minimum one).

product-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean JioMart product saved to the dataset.
